body.title: Wire pre-inference assembler into sprint-ticket
body.result: pre_inference_assemble.py wired into sprint-ticket step 2.3; levers doc updated; both repo + userSettings skills updated
body.intention: I intend that sprint-ticket automatically runs the pre-inference assembler before Step 4 (plan) so the LLM receives pre-assembled context and never needs to spend turns on file discovery.
body.description:
Wire pre_inference_assemble.py into skills/sprint-ticket/SKILL.md at Step 2.3 (anticipatory pre-brief). The assembler output becomes part of the pre-brief block shown before plan review. The LLM reads context rather than deriving it.

**Affected files:** skills/sprint-ticket/SKILL.md (in repo root skills/), tools/pre_inference_assemble.py

**Design rules:** none apply

**Scope boundary:** In scope: add assembler call to Step 2.3 of sprint-ticket, surface output as pre-brief block. Out of scope: changing plan logic, changing test/commit steps, DickSimnel wiring (that's T-dsimnel-pre-inference-parity).

**Completion criteria:** Running /sprint-ticket T-xxx shows a pre-assembled context block (patterns + symbols + graph hits) before Step 4; sprint transcript logs show no file-discovery tool calls for files already listed in the pre-brief.
